summary: The diff implements both REQ-5 and REQ-6 largely as specified. A new LeftSidebar component replaces BottomNav, includes icon-only nav items with tooltips, highlights the active page, offsets the main content area, uses localized labels, and displays the selected god's image with object-contain styling. The BottomNav file still exists (modified but not removed), though functionally it is no longer used in App.tsx. All five nav tabs are present. God image slot is conditionally shown. Most acceptance criteria appear satisfied.

missing_requirements.requirement: The BottomNav component is replaced by the left sidebar.
missing_requirements.reason: BottomNav.tsx is listed as a modified file and is not removed. While it is no longer imported or used in App.tsx, the file still exists. The AC states 'The BottomNav component is replaced by a left sidebar', implying the old component should be gone.

hallucinated_features.description: A decorative circular spiritual-gradient div is rendered in the sidebar header area as a logo or brand mark.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any logo or brand mark element in the sidebar header area. This is an extra UI element not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: An active indicator bar (left-edge orange vertical bar) is rendered on the active nav item button.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies highlighting the active page but does not mention a specific left-edge indicator bar design. This is an embellishment beyond the stated requirements.
